title: Resimlrr Optimized
description: Resimlrr Optimized is a performance-focused Minecraft modpack that boosts gameplay smoothness and visuals, ideal for all systems.
body:
**Resimlrr Optimized - Performance and Visual Improvements**

Welcome to the latest update of **Resimlrr Optimized**! This version focuses on **performance boosts**, **visual improvements**, and **bug fixes** to ensure a smoother and more enjoyable Minecraft experience.

### **Key Features in This Update:**

* **Performance Enhancements:** Significant tweaks and optimizations to increase FPS, delivering a much smoother gameplay experience, especially on lower-end systems.
* **Visual Upgrades:** Fine-tuned improvements to **Sodium**, **Lithium**, and **Indium** for better stability and sharper graphics. Your Minecraft world will look more vibrant without sacrificing performance.
* **Mod Updates:** Updated **Fabric API**, **Sodium**, **Lithium**, and **Starlight** to the latest stable versions, ensuring compatibility and improved efficiency.
* **Bug Fixes:** Fixed rendering issues and reduced stuttering and lag spikes during gameplay, providing an overall smoother experience.

### **FPS Settings Guide:**

If you're looking to further optimize your FPS, I’ve made a detailed guide showing the best settings and tweaks that you can apply to get the best performance from your system. Watch the video below for a step-by-step breakdown of how to adjust these settings and maximize your gameplay performance!

👉 [**Watch FPS Optimization Guide**](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PBsfvnqDrkc&pp=ygUgc29kaXVtIGJlc3QgcGVyZm9ybWFuY2Ugc2V0dGluZ3M%3D)

Whether you're playing on a high-end PC or a more budget-friendly setup, **Resimlrr Optimized** ensures a stable and responsive Minecraft experience with enhanced graphics and reduced lag.
